'''Red glie''' was a [[Plant/Legends|plant]] related to [[green glie]], and possessed similar properties despite its red coloration. It was used by [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] to create a tasty salad dressing, and sold in markets by the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] of that world as a delicacy. The red tint in Gungan bubble dwellings was derived from red glie.

The plant grew on the surface of the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[Gungan Swamp|swamps]] and freshwater lakes. It was highly dependent on sunlight, and whole colonies would die if the weather remained cloudy for substantial lengths of time. The glie consumed bacteria with only limited waste product, and could be used to maintain the purity of water cisterns in emergencies on Naboo.
